name: Ash Taylor
quote:
I actively look for reasons to spend time with Pieter.

The way he sees business, especially where time, systems, and opportunity are being lost is unique and incredibly valuable. 

Every conversation sharpens my thinking, processes and uncovers 1% improvements I didn’t even know were there.

If you’re serious about improving how your business runs, speak to him.

name: David Browne
quote: I've known and worked with Pieter for over a decade. We did the White Room Process workshop at SSC a few years ago, and the impact was immediate and lasting. His ability to take what feels inherently complex and make it simple and actionable is remarkable. Our business wouldn't be where it is today without the insights, challenging conversations and honest guidance Pieter has given us over the years. I'd recommend him without hesitation.

name: Jennifer Bell
quote:
I’ve spent the last 10 years building as an entrepreneur with a very specific bias: I have zero interest in unnecessary process, bloated systems, or vendors who can only operate inside what they already know.

I’ve met with 50+ software providers over that time. Almost all of them stayed in their lane. They could talk features, maybe optimize around the edges, but they couldn’t actually meet me at the level of how an entrepreneur thinks about building something from nothing.

Pieter is the exception.

He’s the only one I’ve worked with who can operate at the altitude of the vision and translate it into what actually needs to happen now. That sounds simple, but it’s one of the hardest gaps to close in building technology.

What’s rare about Pieter is that he can stay in the clouds with you long enough to truly understand what you’re trying to create, and then come down and structure it into something real, scoped, and buildable.

Just as important, he’s relentless about staying on track. That matters more than people think. Most entrepreneurs don’t fail because of lack of ideas, they fail because of distraction. Pieter creates the conditions where the vision actually gets executed without getting pulled into every shiny object along the way.

If you’re looking for someone to just take orders, that’s not him.
If you’re looking for someone who can think with you, challenge you, and turn vision into execution, he’s one of the very few I’ve seen who can actually do it.
